DP.182.0000:
[0103,0000]: Oh, hey, [0103,0001]!
What took you so long?\r
I’m fining you $100 million!\f
Listen up. I’m going to become
the greatest Trainer ever.\f
That’s why I’m here--to toughen
up myself and my Pokémon!\f
DP.182.0001:
Hehehe! Sorry!
I couldn’t help overhearing that.\f
But the greatest Trainer ever?!
That’s going to be really tough.\r
Because you’re talking about me!\f
To prove that, I’m going to the
volcano right now.\f
You look puzzled. You really don’t
know anything, do you?\f
All right, I’ll tell you.
This is the Battle Zone, OK?\f
At the far end, there’s a volcano.\f
And deep inside the volcano, there’s
supposed to be a treasure.\f
DP.182.0002:
[0103,0000]: So?
What’s the big deal?\f
If I find that treasure first, that’ll
make me the greatest Trainer ever?\f
That’s what I’ll do, [0103,0001]!
And you too, stranger!\r
I’m gonna get the treasure first!\f
But before that, I’m going to the
Battle Tower! See ya!\f
DP.182.0003:
That guy...
He can’t stay still, can he?\f
DP.182.0004:
Anyways, howdy, I’m Buck.
Sheesh, that punk can’t beat me.\f
So, do you know that zippity-doodah
of a Trainer?\f
You should chase after that guy
and tell him not to underestimate\r
the volcano.\f
Oh, but you know what?\f
You’d better shape up at the
Battle Tower first, too.\f
I don’t like your chances of getting
to the volcano, otherwise.\f
Be seeing you!\f
DP.182.0005:
Howdy, Trainer!
You have a Pokédex, do you?\f
I bet the person who gave you that
is waiting for you to fill that\r
Pokédex completely.
DP.182.0006:
Howdy, Trainer!
You have a Pokédex, do you?\f
Here’s my advice: go out and
challenge other Trainers!\f
They’ll often have different Pokémon,
so your Pokédex should fill up fast!
DP.182.0007:
The way the Battle Tower looms...\f
It really is a wall that stands
before every Trainer.
DP.182.0008:
I’ve battled many Trainers over
the years.\f
I’ve gained some confidence in my
skill levels, too.\f
But the world is still a huge place.
It’s not easy to win in life!
DP.182.0009:
Because of the volcano, the land
around here is craggy.\f
The rough terrain and all the ups
and downs make it hard to hike.
DP.182.0010:
The Pokémon League’s Elite Four
come here sometimes!
DP.182.0011:
Your Pokémon are from Sinnoh,
aren’t they?\f
They’re not what we’re used to
seeing around here.
DP.182.0012:
There’s no end to becoming tough!\f
I just made that up, but it sounds
kind of cool, huh?
DP.182.0013:
What’s up? Do you want to sail to
Snowpoint City?
DP.182.0014:
Aye, right!
It’s anchors aweigh, then!\f
DP.182.0015:
Oh, right. You’d rather just fly
everywhere in some big hurry.
DP.182.0016:
Whenever I go to a new place, I get
excited over what I might discover.\f
But places I’ve visited before...\f
Even those places thrill me with
new discoveries!
DP.182.0017:
Hmm!
A Super Rod is really good!\f
Wouldn’t you agree?
DP.182.0018:
Hmm!
We’re of identical minds!\f
Hmm!
Take this [0108,0000]!\f
DP.182.0019:
Wherever there’s water, try your
luck at fishing.
DP.182.0021:
What’s that?
Any advice for fishing?\f
Well, I’ll tell you.
It’s all about the rod and technique!
DP.182.0023:
Battle Park Ahead
Where Trainers Train
DP.182.0024:
Rt. 225 Ahead
A Road of Challenges
DP.182.0025:
[0103,0000]: Hey, [0103,0001]!\f
You’re not the only one who’s getting
tougher, you know!\f
I’ll prove it to you!
Get ready to battle!\f
DP.182.0026:
[0103,0000]: ...!
It’s OK, though.\f
[0103,0001], the tougher you get,
the tougher we can get, too.\f
There’s no end to Pokémon.
That’s what I’m saying, [0103,0001].
